title: TopBuild Full Year 2024 Earnings: In Line With Expectations
text: Full Year 2024 Earnings Results: Revenue: $5.33 billion, up 2.6% from FY 2023. Net Income: $622.6 million, up 1.4% from FY 2023. Profit Margin: 12% (consistent with prior year). Earnings Per Share: $20.41, compared to $19.44 in 2023. Performance Assessment: The company met expectations with both revenue and EPS aligning with analyst forecasts. Business Breakdown: The Installation segment generated $3.29 billion (62% of total revenue). Cost of sales represented 70% of revenue at $3.70 billion, while General & Administrative expenses totaled $709.2 million (71% of total operating costs). Outlook: TopBuild projects revenue growth averaging 2.1% annually over the next three years, trailing the broader Consumer Durables industry forecast of 5.5% growth in the U.S. Stock Performance: Shares declined 5.6% over the preceding week.
